channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: sadChestLoot
item.description: Custom loot spawner mod that lets you place loot spawn points anywhere and fully customize loot

item.title: Rock Trader
item.description: Just a trader to sell stones and rocks

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: Waterfall: SomeLiquidSourceTransport
item.description: Water must be manually spread from naturally generated liquid bodies.

item.title: Easy Alcohol Distilling Fork
item.description: Easy Alcohol Distilling

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Backpack Vanilla Sizes Patch
item.description: Patches Backpack mod for our server to be closer to vanilla.

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: Underwater Horrors
item.description: Adds nightmare sea monsters to Vintage Story (Sea Serpents, Kraken)

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: Logging Expanded
item.description: An immersive mod that changes the Timber industry in Vintage Story!

item.title: Vanilla armory
item.description: Implements unused vanilla weapons and some armor in vanilla style

item.title: BetterEr Prospecting
item.description: Altered prospecting experience with focus on reducing randomness

item.title: [Optimization Patch] Catch and Release: Butterflies
item.description: Optimization patch for specific Catch and Release: Butterflies mod

item.title: Temporal Stabilizer
item.description: A craftable, placeable machine that makes an area genuinely immune to temporal-stability drain.

item.title: Catch and Release: Fish
item.description: Catch fish live and place them in various sized aquariums.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Catch and Release: Butterflies
item.description: Catch butterflies live and set them free or place them in terrariums.

item.title: Catch and Release LIB
item.description: Shared library for Catch and Release mods.

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Allows toggling walk (autowalk) and sneak (autosneak). Also supports walking uphill (stepup).

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Metals of Myths [ALPHA]
item.description: An addon for Improved Metallurgy that extends progression even further by adding fantasy metals.

item.title: IndustrialStory
item.description: Overhauls metalworking, chemistry, and glassworking.

item.title: BetterHandbook
item.description: A faster, smarter handbook with mod tabs, recipe lookups, and crafting auto fill.

item.title: Status Hud Continued
item.description: Displays status information on the HUD.

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: Tiered Arrows - Forked
item.description: Tiered Arrows - Forked

item.title: Patches for the Forgotten Legends server
item.description: A few changes for our server

item.title: Historical Armory: Core
item.description: A collection of items to be used in crafting recipes for Historical Weaponry mods.
